title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: BUTTE FALLS CHARTER SCHOOL SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams and sports physicals, treatment of illness and injury, vision and hearing screenings, dental screenings, blood pressure screenings, immunizations, mental health services, age-appropriate reproductive health, routine lab tests, prescription medication maintenance, and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 722 Laurel Avenue Butte Falls, OR 97522 Eligibility: All enrolled students are eligible to receive services. Siblings of enrolled students can also be seen for acute care. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-2:30pm (541) 842-7799 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 842-7799 Main phone Main phone (541) 842-7799 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurances. Sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Jackson County Services: Childhood Immunization Dental Hygiene Dental Screening Emergency Dental Care Mental Health Evaluation Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON CONTRACEPTIVE CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BUTTE FALLS CHARTER SCHOOL SBHC
